source: Canonical Rabiner-tutorial worked HMM (Rabiner 1989, Proc. IEEE 77(2):257-286; the widely republished {Healthy,Fever} / {normal,cold,dizzy} instance). States 0=Healthy 1=Fever; symbols 0=normal 1=cold 2=dizzy. The Forward likelihood P(O)=0.03628 and the Viterbi best path {Healthy,Healthy,Fever} with joint probability 0.01512 are published reference values; both are additionally cross-checked by exhaustive brute-force path enumeration in the test suite.
